_doc: Design elements that are FORBIDDEN across all visual outputs. Both asset_gen and reviewer reference this list.
forbidden_mascot: duplicate mascot (more than one in same image)
corner mascot (small mascot tucked in corner as decoration)
footer mascot (mascot at bottom as branding strip)
mascot with different face/markings from reference
mascot with realistic fur texture (must be smooth matte plastic)
forbidden_layout: multiple main messages on one card
text hard to scan at mobile size
no clear hero object on cover card
forbidden_typography: more than 3 font sizes on one card
text with no contrast against background
forbidden_animation: multiple animated elements on same card
